free_text: Elastic and inelastic neutron scattering on elemental
Deuterium gas target, 1.0 cm in diameter and
3.0 cm in length, gas pressure 1.7 hPa.
Mean neutron energy is defined within +/-20 keV.
n/gamma discrimination with pulse shape analysis
The angle region covered is 12.5 deg to 160 deg.
An additional NE213 detector was used as relative
fluence monitor, diameter 3.81 cm, length 3.81 cm.
The movable monitor (in a fixed distance of 651 cm)
was always in a position of 58.9 deg relative
height 49.9 mm, mass 41.83 g, placed 17.5 cm from the
Monte Carlo simulated TOF spectra of the complete
angular distribution were iteratively adjusted to
the measured TOF spectra. The simulation comprised
the neutron production in the gas target and the
scattering geometry between target, sample and
